title: Implement pending() method to query open bot orders

requirements.text: Add a `pending` query method to the backend actor that returns the currently open orders placed by the bot. This method should replace any incorrect or placeholder calls previously used to retrieve open orders, and must return the same order data shape already used in the codebase (side, price, quantity, order ID).

quotes: Método pending — consultar ordens abertas do bot (substituindo qualquer chamada incorreta)

acceptanceCriteria: A `pending` query function exists in backend/main.mo and returns the list of open bot orders.
The return type matches the existing open order data structure used elsewhere in the actor.
Any previous incorrect API call used to fetch open orders is replaced by this `pending` method.
Calling `pending` when no orders are open returns an empty array without error.

requirements.text: Update the frontend `useQueries.ts` open orders hook to call the backend `pending` method instead of any previously incorrect call. Ensure the OpenOrdersPanel continues to display the fetched orders correctly.

quotes: Método pending — consultar ordens abertas do bot (substituindo qualquer chamada incorreta)

acceptanceCriteria: The open orders React Query hook in useQueries.ts calls `actor.pending()` (or equivalent generated name).
The OpenOrdersPanel renders the orders returned by the `pending` call without regression.
No stale or incorrect actor method name remains in the open orders query.

constraints: Do not alter the immutable frontend hook files: useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, or main.tsx.
The new `pending` method must be a query (not an update) call for read-only order consultation.
Preserve all existing bot state, order placement, and cancellation logic in the backend actor.
nonGoals: Changing the grid order placement or cancellation logic.
Adding new configuration parameters or bot control behavior.
